title: ConstEval crash in extract_fa
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Run `extract_fa` on:

```
module \top
  wire input 1 \A
  wire output 2 \Y
  cell $_AND_ \sub
    connect \A \A
    connect \B 1'0
    connect \Y \Y
  end
end
```

## Expected behavior

No crash.

## Actual behavior

ERROR: Assert `current_val[i].wire != NULL || current_val[i] == value.bits[i]' failed in ./kernel/consteval.h:79.
code_blocks:
module \top
  wire input 1 \A
  wire output 2 \Y
  cell $_AND_ \sub
    connect \A \A
    connect \B 1'0
    connect \Y \Y
  end
end
